title: Whispers of the Wendigo
description: A horror mod which adds a Wendigo into the game.
body:
**Required mods: Geckolib for 1.19.4 or 1.19.2**  
 
**Recommended shaders: Complementary / Spooklemenary**

 If you want to receive updates on this mod, want to report bugs / issues or suggest new additions, join my discord server!
 
 [![](https://dcbadge.limes.pink/api/server/HGYq2nJwGT)](https://discord.com/invite/HGYq2nJwGT)

This mod adds a terrifying beast called the **Wendigo** into Minecraft.
It will curse you as soon as you enter a Snowy or normal Taiga biome and then start stalking you.
You will hear sounds, footsteps and things breaking around you before **it appears**

In the Taigas a few things to help you along can be found,for example: A log cabin!
These cabins are full of Wood and resources to help you and also contain a **rifle** hidden in a chest which can be used to fight off the beast.

But some cabins were already destroyed by the Wendigo and contain the horrorfying sight of a dismembered Lumberjack.

The forest itself isn't empty: **Dead bodies** of different animals can be found laying in the snow. Break and use these to your advantage, because they give food.

When the **Wendigo starts hunting,** start running and use your blocks to gain distance, so you can shoot it with a rifle. This will only stun the beast for about 5 seconds but might just save your life.

And do not feel safe behind a wall or a window in your house because **it can break in.** Because of its size and long arms it rips apart trees and anything it its way, so it never stops or has to go around a tree.

If you get killed and you respawn, **it's not over yet:** It will start stalking again.

With each attack passing by the time inbetween will get shorter, but do not feel safer, as this just means that you will be **targeted quicker.**

If you survive, good job.

 

**If you enter a snowy taiga biome and you don't get cursed by the Wendigo (Curse of the Snow Potion effect doesn't apply to you),**
 
**relog or rejoin your world.**

**If the Wendigo seems to not be animating correctly, turn off your shaders or try to search for an option to turn off entity shaddows in Minecraft settings / Shader settings or config.**
 
**Relogging, after Curse of the Snow got applied to you will mess up the timings and cause the stalking sequence to reinitiate from beginning.**
